# AI PubKit

AI PubKit is a global one-click AI publishing tool for creators, agencies, and teams.

Primary URL: https://aipubkit.com/

Key pages:
- https://aipubkit.com/apps/ - supported one-click publishing app destinations
- https://aipubkit.com/request-app/ - request a new publishing app
- https://aipubkit.com/one-click-publishing/ - how one-click AI publishing works

Short answer:
AI PubKit helps teams publish AI-generated content to global social, video, community, and CMS platforms from one focused publishing workflow.
